title: Lesson 253: 彼女, 壁, 構う...

items.gloss: wall; partition; barrier; obstacle; Chinese "Wall" constellation (one of the 28 mansions)

to mind; to care about; to be concerned about; to have a regard for; to be an issue; to matter; to create inconvenience; to keep company; to care for; to look after; to entertain; to pay attention to; to spend time with; to interfere with; to meddle in; to tease; to banish; to prohibit

to bite; to chew; to gnaw; to masticate; to fumble one's words (esp. during a play, broadcast, etc.); to falter with one's words; to stutter; to stammer; to crash against (e.g. of waves); to break onto (shore); to engage (of cogs, zippers, etc.); to mesh; to fit together; to be involved in; to convince; to persuade
